items.title: Jim Cramer on Dow Inc.: “It Could Have Another Point or Two, But That’s All”
items.description: Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer expressed thoughts on. A caller asked if the stock is a buy, sell, or hold. In response, Cramer said: “No, I’ll tell you why. It had a nice bounce off the cut. It could have another point or two, but that’s all. I don’t want […]

items.title: Warehouse Automation Market Size to Exceed $71.25 Billion by 2033, at 15.93% CAGR | Research by SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The warehouse automation market is projected to grow from $21.84 billion in 2025 to $71.25 billion by 2033, driven by e-commerce expansion, rising labor costs, and technological advancements in robotics and AI.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Partnered with Hai Robotics to deliver advanced storage and retrieval systems, indicating strategic innovation and market growth
